home.hero_subtitle: Sun protection, glass roofs & interior design from East Frisia. Since 1880.
home.services_subtitle: From patio covers to interior design — everything from one source, crafted in our own production facility.
home.why_subtitle: For over 145 years, we've been combining East Frisian craftsmanship with modern solutions for your home.
home.why_production_text: No mass production — every product is individually crafted in our workshop in Norden.
home.why_experience_text: Since 1880, the Everwien name has stood for quality, reliability and craftsmanship perfection.
home.why_consultation_text: Visit our 2,000 m² showroom in Norden — free and without obligation.
home.contact_hours:
Mon – Fri: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Sat: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM
Sun: closed
home.karriere_text: We're looking for dedicated craftspeople, apprentices and sales consultants.

faq_questions.q: What does a patio cover cost?
faq_questions.a: Costs depend on size, material and features. A glass roof starts at approx. €5,000 — we'll gladly calculate individual solutions for you personally. Schedule a free consultation!
Depending on the project, installation takes between one and five working days. Patio covers are often done in 2–3 days, conservatories need a bit more time.
Yes, in cooperation with our partners, we offer flexible financing options. Just ask us during your consultation appointment.

faq_questions.q: Can I visit the showroom without an appointment?
faq_questions.a: Of course! Our 2,000 m² showroom in Norden can be visited during opening hours at any time without an appointment.

faq_questions.q: Do you deliver outside East Frisia?
faq_questions.a: Yes! We deliver and install throughout northwestern Germany. Our core area is East Frisia and the region around Norden, Aurich, Emden and Leer.

glasdaecher.hero_subtitle: From patio covers to conservatories — your outdoor oasis, protected in any weather.
glasdaecher.products_title: The Right Cover for Every Need
glasdaecher.products_subtitle: Whether classic patio roof, light-filled conservatory or elegant wind protection — we craft everything in our own production in Norden.

products.title: Patio Roofs
products.text: High-quality aluminium constructions with safety glass. Enjoy your patio in any weather — dry and protected.

products.title: Conservatories
products.text: Glazed patio covers with flexible side elements. Use your garden from spring to autumn — wind and rain protected.
details: Glass folding walls for flexible access

products.title: Glass Wind Protection
products.text: Elegant glass wind protection systems for patio and balcony. Protection from wind without blocking the view.

products.title: Front Door Canopies
products.text: Stylish canopies that protect and enhance your entrance area. Available in various designs and materials.

glasdaecher.advantages_title: Why a Glass Roof from Everwien?

advantages.title: 10-Year Warranty
advantages.text: On construction and glazing — for long-term security.

advantages.title: Own Manufacturing
advantages.text: Custom-made from our workshop in Norden — no mass production.

advantages.title: Smart Home Ready
advantages.text: Integrated control for shading, lighting and ventilation.

advantages.title: Personal Consultation
advantages.text: Free at your location or in our showroom.

glasdaecher.cta_text: Get free advice — on-site or in our 2,000 m² showroom in Norden.

sonnenschutz.hero_subtitle: Awnings, shutters, external blinds & smart controls — for optimal climate in your home.
sonnenschutz.products_subtitle: From classic awnings to intelligent controls — we offer the perfect solution for every need.

products.title: Awnings
products.text: Folding arm, cassette and conservatory awnings in numerous colours and fabrics. With optional wind guard and electric motor.
details: Folding arm awnings up to 7m extension

products.title: Roller Shutters
products.text: Modern roller shutters for heat insulation, sound protection and burglar resistance. Ideal for retrofitting existing buildings.

products.title: Interior Solutions
products.text: Pleated blinds, venetian blinds and interior roller blinds in countless colours and transparency levels. Perfect light control for every room.

products.title: External Blinds
products.text: External venetian blinds with adjustable slats — the most effective sun protection with full daylight use and visibility.

products.title: Smart Home Controls
products.text: Control your sun protection via app, voice or fully automatically via sensors. We integrate all common systems.

advantages.title: UV Protection
advantages.text: High-quality fabrics with up to 95% UV protection for your health.

advantages.title: Retrofit Possible
advantages.text: Almost all our products can be easily retrofitted.

advantages.title: 5-Year Warranty
advantages.text: On all sun protection products incl. motor and controls.

advantages.title: Smart Home
advantages.text: Integration into all common smart home systems possible.

sonnenschutz.cta_text: We advise you for free — at your location or in our showroom in Norden.

insektenschutz.hero_subtitle: Fresh air without uninvited guests — custom solutions for windows and doors.
insektenschutz.products_title: For Every Window and Every Door
insektenschutz.products_subtitle: Whether fixed frame, roller or sliding door — we find the perfect solution, precisely fitting and in premium quality.

products.title: Fixed Frames
products.text: The classic: permanently mounted frame with fine mesh. Easy to insert, easy to clean and long-lasting.

products.title: Insect Screen Rollers
products.text: Flexibly pull down when needed — ideal for windows and skylights. Disappears invisibly into the cassette.

products.title: Sliding Doors
products.text: For large patio doors and balcony doors. Smooth-running, stable and barrier-free threshold possible.

products.title: Hinged Frames
products.text: For balcony doors and front doors: open and close like a second door. Robust and practical.

advantages.title: Custom Made
advantages.text: Every frame is made exactly to your window and door measurements.

advantages.title: Pollen Mesh
advantages.text: Special mesh for allergy sufferers — up to 90% fewer pollen.

advantages.title: Easy Installation
advantages.text: Quick, clean installation — usually without drilling.

insektenschutz.cta_text: We come to you, take measurements and install — everything from one source.

gartenmoebel.hero_title: Garden Furniture for Your Outdoor Paradise
gartenmoebel.hero_subtitle: From lounge furniture to beach chairs to parasols — discover our selection in the showroom.
gartenmoebel.products_title: Quality That Delights Summer After Summer
gartenmoebel.products_subtitle: Whether metal, wood or plastic — we only carry selected brands that meet the highest standards of design and durability.

products.title: Lounge Furniture
products.text: Comfortable lounge sets for patio and garden. Weatherproof, easy to maintain and available in many designs.

products.title: Beach Chairs

products.title: Outdoor Furniture
products.text: Dining tables, chairs and benches in aluminium, teak or poly-rattan. For convivial hours outdoors.

products.title: Parasols
products.text: Large cantilever parasols, classic centre-pole parasols and commercial parasols. UV protection in elegant design.

advantages.title: 2,000 m² Showroom
advantages.text: Try, touch, compare — in our large showroom.

advantages.title: Brand Quality
advantages.text: Only selected brands — for durability and design.

advantages.title: Delivery & Assembly
advantages.text: We deliver and assemble your new furniture at your home.

gartenmoebel.cta_text: Over 2,000 m² of garden furniture, beach chairs and more — to touch and try.

raumdesign.products_subtitle: Whether classic curtain, modern panel blind or stylish accessory — we design your rooms to your wishes.

products.title: Curtains

products.title: Panel Blinds

products.title: Home Accessories
products.text: Cushions, tablecloths, decorative fabrics and more — the perfect complement to your room concept. Everything coordinated.

advantages.title: Personal Consultation

advantages.title: Custom Tailoring

Free parking directly in front of the showroom.

karriere.hero_subtitle: Join a team that has been delivering quality with passion for over 145 years.
karriere.why_text1: At Everwien, we combine the values of a traditional craft business with the possibilities of modern technology. Since 1880, we've been manufacturing sun protection, glass roofs and room solutions in Norden — and we're looking for people who want to continue this tradition with us.
karriere.why_text2: Whether experienced installer, dedicated sales consultant or motivated apprentice — what counts is team spirit, quality awareness and the joy of craftsmanship.

benefits.title: Tradition & Innovation
benefits.text: 145+ years of experience meets cutting-edge technology and materials.

benefits.title: Family-Like Team
benefits.text: Manageable team size with personal interaction and short paths.

benefits.title: East Frisia Region
benefits.text: Live and work where others go on holiday — on the North Sea coast.

benefits.title: Further Training
benefits.text: Regular training and development — we invest in your knowledge.

benefits.title: Secure Workplace
benefits.text: A company with 145 years of history — that speaks for stability.

benefits.title: Modern Equipment
benefits.text: Professional tools and vehicles — so you can work well.

jobs.title: Installer — Sun Protection & Glass Roofs
jobs.text: Installation of glass roofs, awnings and sun protection systems at our customers' locations.

jobs.title: Apprentice — Roller Shutter & Sun Protection Mechatronics
jobs.text: Learn a future-proof profession with technology, craftsmanship and customer contact. Start: August 2026.

jobs.title: Sales Consultant — Showroom & Consulting
jobs.text: Advising our customers in the showroom and during home visits. Enjoy working with people.

karriere.initiative_subtitle: We always welcome motivated applications — just send us your documents.

ueber_uns.hero_subtitle: Since 1880, we've been combining East Frisian craftsmanship with innovation. Get to know us.
ueber_uns.chronik_subtitle: From a small workshop to a modern craft business — a family story from Norden.

chronik.text: Founded by Ortgies Janssen Everwien as saddler at Neuen Weg 239, Norden. First saddlery work for Doornkaat brewery, then upholstery, wallpapering and leather goods.
Prize of honour at the 1st East Frisian Agricultural Trade Exhibition.
Son Folrich Everwien passes master craftsman exam — 2nd generation takes over.
3rd generation: Ortgies Everwien passes master craftsman exam.
Ortgies Everwien takes over the business after the war. Beginning of modernisation and realignment of the company.
Modernisation with concrete and glass, spacious shop window displays.
Günter Everwien passes the master craftsman exam in interior decoration. His motto: 'Progress is everything, standstill means decline.'
4th generation Günter Everwien — expansion into roller shutters, venetian blinds and awning construction.
First production hall 600 m² at Norder Tief 43.
Production hall expanded, pleated blinds and roller blinds added to the range.
5th generation: Folkert Everwien (master craftsman and architect) joins the company.
Approximately 40 employees, 2,000 m² showroom and own production. Your partner for sun protection and interior design in East Frisia.

werte.title: Quality
werte.text: Every product is carefully manufactured and tested. We stand for craftsmanship perfection and durable materials.

werte.title: Regionality
werte.text: We manufacture in Norden, consult in the region and strengthen East Frisia as a business location.

werte.title: Sustainability
werte.text: Durable products instead of throwaway mentality. Energy-efficient sun protection saves heating and cooling costs.

ueber_uns.team_text1: Our team consists of experienced craftspeople, creative consultants and dedicated apprentices. What connects us: the joy of finding the best solutions for our customers.
ueber_uns.team_text2: Visit us in our 2,000 m² showroom in Norden — here you can experience our products live and get advice from our team.
ueber_uns.partners_subtitle: We work exclusively with renowned manufacturers to guarantee you the highest quality.
ueber_uns.cta_text: Visit our showroom or schedule a consultation — we look forward to meeting you.

faq.hero_subtitle: Find answers to the most important questions about our products and services.

questions.q: What does a patio cover cost?
questions.a: Costs depend on size, material and features. A simple patio cover starts at approx. €5,000, a fully equipped conservatory can cost €20,000 and more. We'll gladly prepare an individual quote — free and without obligation.

questions.q: What's the difference between a wintergarden and conservatory?
questions.a: A wintergarden is a fully insulated, heated living space — usable year-round. A conservatory is a glazed patio cover without insulation, ideal from spring to autumn. The conservatory is more affordable and usually doesn't require a building permit.

questions.q: Do I need a building permit for a glass roof?
questions.a: This depends on the size and your state. In Lower Saxony, patio covers up to a certain size are permit-free. Wintergardens as living space extensions usually require a permit. We're happy to advise and can handle the application for you.

questions.q: How long does glass roof installation take?
questions.a: A standard patio cover is installed in 2–3 working days. Conservatories with side glazing need 3–5 days. The exact duration depends on size and features — we discuss the schedule with you in advance.

Yes, almost all our sun protection solutions can be easily retrofitted. Awnings, roller shutters, external blinds and pleated blinds can be installed on existing buildings. We come to you, take measurements and find the optimal solution.

questions.q: How do I properly care for my awning?
questions.a: Regularly brush dry with a soft brush. For heavier soiling, clean with lukewarm mild soap solution and let dry well. Retract the awning in storms and prolonged rain. We also offer professional cleaning and impregnation.

questions.q: Do you offer smart home controls?
questions.a: Yes! We integrate your sun protection into common smart home systems (e.g. Somfy TaHoma, Homematic, KNX). Control via app, voice assistant or fully automatically via sun, wind and rain sensors.

questions.q: Which is better: awning or external blind?
questions.a: It depends on the location. Awnings are excellent for patios and balconies — they provide large-area shade. External blinds are ideal for windows and facades — they offer precise light control with full visibility.

questions.q: Can I visit the showroom without an appointment?
questions.a: Of course! Our 2,000 m² showroom in Norden can be visited during opening hours (Mon–Fri 9–6 PM, Sat 10–2 PM) at any time without an appointment. For a detailed personal consultation, we recommend making an appointment.

questions.q: Do you deliver outside East Frisia?
questions.a: Yes! Our core area is East Frisia — Norden, Aurich, Emden, Leer and surroundings. But we also deliver and install throughout northwestern Germany.

questions.q: Do you offer a callback service?
questions.a: Yes, you can request a callback via our contact form. Simply check 'I would like a callback' and we'll get back to you promptly — usually the same working day.

questions.q: Do you also offer maintenance and repairs?
questions.a: Of course! We offer maintenance, inspection and repair for all our products — including third-party products.
Yes, in cooperation with our financing partners, we offer flexible instalment payments. Whether glass roof, awning or garden furniture — just ask us about it.
At least 5 years on all products. Glass roofs and patio covers: up to 10 years on construction. Motors and controls: 5–7 years depending on manufacturer.

questions.q: How long from order to installation?
questions.a: Delivery time varies by product: awnings and shutters approx. 3–4 weeks, patio covers approx. 4–6 weeks, conservatories approx. 6–8 weeks.
Depending on project size, we ask for a deposit of 30–50% when the order is placed. The remaining amount is due after successful installation and acceptance.
